'''Deleta''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] participant of the [[Katharsis]], the game founded by the failed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] and the Telosian treasurer [[Vox Chun]].

==Biography==
As Telos fell to corruption the second time, Deleta was one of those that lost hope. When she heard about the ''[[BioCruiser]]'', Deleta decided to be one of the first to leave the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and find a new settled home. Fifteen years later, she joined the ideology of [[Kad Chun]] and boarded the ''BioCruiser'', which would become her home.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: Deceptions]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
